description_long: This muffin features a rounded, golden-brown baked body encased in a deep red, pleated paper wrapper. The top is adorned with a thick layer of white icing, which is artfully slashed with several elongated, curved cuts that reveal the muffin beneath. The icing appears matte and slightly textured, with the slashes providing a striking visual contrast. The wrapper is tightly fitted and has a subtle ribbed texture, typical of standard muffin liners. No additional toppings or decorative elements are present beyond the icing. The muffin is shown isolated, with no visible plate or surface beneath it.
description: A golden-brown muffin in a red pleated wrapper, topped with thick white icing featuring dramatic slashed patterns.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muffin's white icing with five deep, parallel slashes and the red pleated wrapper.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved, elongated slashes in the icing and the smooth, rounded muffin body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the icing's edge with fewer visible slashes and a more continuous white surface.
description_view_3: Angled view reveals the depth and spacing of the icing slashes and the muffin's golden-brown side.
attribute_frosting_style: thick white icing with elongated, slashed cutouts
